page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: HIST419G or HIST484.

Formerly: HIST419G.

Courses in 2025-2026 Academic Catalog - DRAFT COPY 277

HIST486 Social Issues in Modern China (3 Credits)

Explores the problems surrounding family, community, and social life

in modern China, including a focus on issues that affect groups and subcultures within the population. Examines as well the political system's capacity to regulate this complex society.

Recommended: HIST285; and HIST481.
